technical_skills: Business Intelligence Data Analytics Business Analytics Computer Science Engineering AI-driven business intelligence solutions Dashboard development Reporting systems KPI tracking Data visualization Data Analysis Data Visualization Reporting Automation AI-Enabled Analytics Process Improvement Business Intelligence Initiatives Reporting and dashboarding Business KPIs SQL Excel/Google Sheets Data visualization concepts Power BI Tableau Google Data Studio ETL concepts Data Warehousing Business Reporting systems
experience: Hands-on exposure to business analytics, dashboard development, reporting systems, KPI tracking, data visualization, and AI-driven business intelligence solutions. Work closely with Product, Growth, Finance, Operations, and Analytics teams on live business reporting and decision-making initiatives. Collect, analyze, and interpret business data from multiple sources. Assist in creating dashboards, reports, and KPI tracking systems. Work on business performance analysis and trend identification. Support data visualization and reporting automation activities. Prepare analytical summaries and business insight reports. Assist in data cleaning, validation, and quality monitoring. Collaborate with cross-functional teams for business reporting requirements. Support forecasting and data-driven decision-making activities. Basic understanding of data analytics and business intelligence concepts Familiarity with SQL, Excel/Google Sheets, and data visualization concepts Good analytical and logical thinking abilities Internship/project experience in analytics is preferred
general: Internship Opportunity: Business Intelligence (BI) Analyst Intern. Department: Business Intelligence / Analytics. Location: Indore / Mumbai. Internship Duration: 3–6 Months. PPO Opportunity: Yes – Based on Performance. Eligible students pursuing B.Tech / M.Tech / MBA or related fields from IITs, IIMs, NITs, and Top Institutes. Exposure to AI-powered analytics and reporting tools Prompt Engineering basics AI-assisted dashboarding and reporting workflows Intelligent business insight and automation systems Business analytics and reporting systems Live business intelligence projects AI-driven analytics and automation tools
positions_of_responsibility: Strong analytical and business-oriented mindset Passion for data visualization and business insights Curiosity to understand business trends and performance metrics Good communication and presentation skills Quick learner with problem-solving abilities
achievements: Competitions Research exposure Publications Kaggle Hackathons Rankings Awards
